title: Redirect Gated LearnDash Topic Pages to Course Landing Page
story: As a visitor accessing a gated training topic, I want to be redirected to the course landing page, so that I understand how to enroll rather than seeing a blocked page.
description:
When a user visits a gated topic page within LearnDash training content (e.g., SQL for Salesforce), they should be automatically redirected to the course landing page rather than seeing an access-denied or empty page.

Preferred redirect targets:
- LearnDash course page: `https://datatoolspro.com/courses/learn-sql-for-salesforce/`
- Marketing landing page: `https://datatoolspro.com/sql-for-salesforce/`

The redirect should first check if LearnDash has a built-in redirect option. If not, custom code should handle the redirect to the course landing page.
acceptance_criteria: Users visiting gated LearnDash topic pages are redirected to the course landing page
The redirect works for all gated topics, not just SQL for Salesforce
Non-enrolled users see the course landing page instead of a blocked topic page
ux_changes: Users visiting gated topic pages are seamlessly redirected to the course landing page instead of seeing a blocked or empty page.
middleware_changes: LearnDash redirect logic implemented, either through built-in settings or custom PHP code to detect gated topics and redirect unenrolled users.
implementation_notes: Check LearnDash built-in redirect settings first. If unavailable, implement custom redirect logic in the WordPress theme or a custom plugin.
